seoTitle: Punchbowl vs Quamby Bend — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Punchbowl and Quamby Bend. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Punchbowl vs Quamby Bend: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Punchbowl and Quamby Bend.
heading: Punchbowl vs Quamby Bend — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Punchbowl, Tasmania and Quamby Bend, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Punchbowl has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Quamby Bend (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Punchbowl or Quamby Bend safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Punchbowl has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Quamby Bend scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Punchbowl scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Quamby Bend scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Punchbowl or Quamby Bend?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Punchbowl has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
